title: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years
summary: Despite robust economic growth in China, its stock markets have surprisingly failed to regain their previous highs over the past two decades. This divergence highlights a complex interplay of domestic policies, investor sentiment, and structural issues within the Chinese financial system.
